zh.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Meurig是Meuric Ap Dyfnwallon Ap Arthen的女兒，於大約0825年出生在威爾士。她於0840年與King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons在英國威爾斯尼德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales: 威尔士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素
zh-hans.Gwlad, Carmarthenshire, Wales: 威尔士卡馬特史爾拉德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Meurig是Meuric Ap Dyfnwallon Ap Arthen的女儿，于大约0825年出生在威尔士。她于0840年与King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons在英国威尔斯尼德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Angharad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Celtic intensive prefix an- + cār ‘love’ + the noun suffix -ad. This was the name of the mother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’). In the Mabinogi, Angharad Golden Hand at first rejects Peredur's suit, but later falls in love with him when he comes back as the unknown Mute Knight. The name has been strongly revived in Wales since the 1940s, borne, for example, by the actress Angharad Rees ( 1949-2012 ).

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Meurig was born about 0825, in Wales as the daughter of Meuric Ap Dyfnwallon Ap Arthen. She married King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons in 0840, in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Meurig est née environ 0825, à Galles, fille de Meuric Ap Dyfnwallon Ap Arthen. Elle a épousé King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons en 0840, à Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Meurig wurde um 0825 in Wales, als Tochter von Meuric Ap Dyfnwallon Ap Arthen geboren. Sie hat 0840 in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

ht.Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom: Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Meurig è nata il circa 0825 nel Galles come figlia di Meuric Ap Dyfnwallon Ap Arthen. Lei sposato King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons nel 0840, nel Gwynedd, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Meurigは約0825年にウェールズでMeuric Ap Dyfnwallon Ap Arthenの娘として生まれた。0840年にイギリスウェールズグウイネッドでKing Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britonsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Meurig(은)는 대략 0825년 웨일스에서 Meuric Ap Dyfnwallon Ap Arthen의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 0840년 영국 웨일스 그w이네드에서 King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

mg.Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom: Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Meurig nasceu aproximadamente 0825, em Gales filha de Meuric Ap Dyfnwallon Ap Arthen. Ela casou-se com King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons em 0840, em Gwynedd, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Meurig родилась около 0825 г. в местности Уэльс. Её отца звали Meuric Ap Dyfnwallon Ap Arthen. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons в 0840 г. в местности гвинедд, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Meurig nació aproximadamente 0825, en Gales como hija de Meuric Ap Dyfnwallon Ap Arthen. Se casó con King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons en 0840, en Gwynedd, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas.
